message:
docs: add underexplored integration opportunities to NTM plan

Major revision making the plan self-contained for external review.

New sections:
- "What is NTM?" with architecture and key files
- Full Dicklesworthstone Stack explanation (8 tools)
- UNDEREXPLORED: bv Robot Modes (12+ modes, track-based assignment,
  graph analysis with PageRank/betweenness, label specialization)
- UNDEREXPLORED: CASS Historical Context (pre-task enrichment,
  project history, error resolution)
- UNDEREXPLORED: s2p Context Preparation (token budgeting,
  file discovery, pipeline context)
- UNDEREXPLORED: UBS Dashboard & Notifications (bug widget,
  agent notifications, quality metrics)
- Priority Matrix with effort/impact analysis
- Implementation tiers and recommended sequence

1,377 insertions, 860 deletions - nearly 2x the content.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
